ingest_latency.pipeline:
filter OBSERVATION_KIND = "http"
filter string(EXTRA.metric_name) = "credit_ingest_latency_ms"
make_col OBSERVATION_KIND:string(EXTRA.metric_name)
timechart options(empty_bins:true), value:avg(float64(FIELDS.value)), group_by(OBSERVATION_KIND)

throughput_rps.pipeline:
filter OBSERVATION_KIND = "http"
filter string(EXTRA.metric_name) = "credit_events_per_min"
make_col OBSERVATION_KIND:string(EXTRA.metric_name)
timechart options(empty_bins:true), value:avg(float64(FIELDS.value)), group_by(OBSERVATION_KIND)

top_issuers_24h.pipeline:
filter OBSERVATION_KIND = "http"
filter string(EXTRA.metric_name) = "credit_issuer_event_count"
make_col issuer:string(EXTRA.issuer)
make_col count:int64(FIELDS.value)
top 10, count
pick_col issuer, count

error_rate.pipeline:
filter OBSERVATION_KIND = "http"
filter string(EXTRA.metric_name) = "credit_error_count"
make_col OBSERVATION_KIND:string(EXTRA.metric_name)
timechart options(empty_bins:true), value:sum(float64(FIELDS.value)), group_by(OBSERVATION_KIND)
